title: Xfect
description: Ever wanted to be the one and only Perfect Being? Now you can!
body:
![Xfect Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/221db7e28c82b48a66360d22067601f21465cd58.png)
## The Perfection With this Mod you can achieve the Perfect Form (no, you won't be Cell). By getting **A LOT** of resources you can craft this Trinket that will give you wonderful powers. Be aware: this Mod is made for people that like to grind and farm materials to achieve and get a Strong and Exclusive Item. This Mod requires [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric) for the Crafting Recipe Types and [Trinkets](https://modrinth.com/mod/trinkets).
Do you want to know what materials are needed to make all the stuff? - 75 Netherite Ingots
- 50 Scutes
- 8 beacons
- 4 Conduits
- 4 Dragon Brain Rests
- 8 Sniffer Nose Flours
- 4 Ghast Tears
- 8 Phantom Membranes
- Totem of Immortality
- 8 Netherite Upgrade Smithing Templates
- 80 echo shards
- Uncalibrated Perfection
## The One and Only ![Uncalibrated Perfection Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c502e89b23d83cbe93f49d15f960cc14604c7d0f.png)
This Trinket is too powerful so it can be obtained by only one player. By using the Dragon Egg you will be able to obtain the " Uncalibrated Perfection" and after crafting the various pieces, you'll be able to assemble the Perfection. ## Perfection Recipe ![Perfection Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e5027df9658c16c203626caf4f18d031ce234fd2.png) ## Nothing lasts forever ![Stabilizing Meal Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ad3f75cf00b6386b1ed7d640a25542ad8ea8c177.png)
The Perfection is a living being that replaces your brain in the new Trinket Brain Slot. To get the powers you need to fill it by feeding it the Stabilizing Meal. A full filled Perfection lasts 2 hours. ## What if I want back the Dragon Egg? ![Dragon Egg Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5cfdf683190311b084f08d84970d0521ac4eb612.png)
Don't worry! You can craft it using the Uncalibrated Perfection or you can smelt the Perfection (or its incomplete version) in a Blast Furnace (it'll take a **LONG** time so put a lot of fuel). ## What else? I won't leave everything here. I already explained how to make things and other stuff on the Advancements. Just use a Recipe Searcher Mod to see all the craftings. ## Known Issues - The Perfection (and its incomplete version) and the Uncalibrated Perfection can be destroyed if dropped into the Void. - The Perfection can't be filled with a Spout. You can fill it by putting it in a Crafting Grid with the Stabilizing Meal.
